scripts.start: bash -lc 'set -o pipefail; mkdir -p .agent/logs; NG_BUILD_MAX_WORKERS=12 ng serve --configuration development 2>&1 | tee .agent/logs/ng-serve.log'
scripts.start:pcores: bash -lc 'set -o pipefail; mkdir -p .agent/logs; taskset -c 0-3 env NG_BUILD_MAX_WORKERS=12 ng serve --configuration development 2>&1 | tee .agent/logs/ng-serve.log'
scripts.start:prod: bash -lc 'set -o pipefail; mkdir -p .agent/logs; NG_BUILD_MAX_WORKERS=12 ng serve --configuration production-serve 2>&1 | tee .agent/logs/ng-serve-prod.log'
scripts.build:pcores: taskset -c 0-3 env NG_BUILD_MAX_WORKERS=12 ng build --configuration development
scripts.build:log: bash -lc 'set -o pipefail; mkdir -p .agent/logs; NG_BUILD_MAX_WORKERS=12 ng build --configuration development 2>&1 | tee .agent/logs/ng-build.log'
scripts.build:prod: NG_BUILD_MAX_WORKERS=12 ng build --configuration production && node scripts/stamp-prod-build.js
scripts.build:prod:pcores: taskset -c 0-3 env NG_BUILD_MAX_WORKERS=12 ng build --configuration production && node scripts/stamp-prod-build.js
scripts.build:prod:log: bash -lc 'set -o pipefail; mkdir -p .agent/logs; NG_BUILD_MAX_WORKERS=12 ng build --configuration production 2>&1 | tee .agent/logs/ng-build-prod.log && node scripts/stamp-prod-build.js 2>&1 | tee -a .agent/logs/ng-build-prod.log'
scripts.build:gh: NG_BUILD_MAX_WORKERS=12 ng build --configuration production --base-href /myscoutee/ && node scripts/stamp-prod-build.js
scripts.build:gh:pcores: taskset -c 0-3 env NG_BUILD_MAX_WORKERS=12 ng build --configuration production --base-href /myscoutee/ && node scripts/stamp-prod-build.js
scripts.build:gh:log: bash -lc 'set -o pipefail; mkdir -p .agent/logs; NG_BUILD_MAX_WORKERS=12 ng build --configuration production --base-href /myscoutee/ 2>&1 | tee .agent/logs/ng-build-gh.log && node scripts/stamp-prod-build.js 2>&1 | tee -a .agent/logs/ng-build-gh.log'
scripts.watch:pcores: taskset -c 0-3 env NG_BUILD_MAX_WORKERS=12 ng build --watch --configuration development
scripts.watch:log: bash -lc 'mkdir -p .agent/logs; NG_BUILD_MAX_WORKERS=12 ng build --watch --configuration development 2>&1 | tee .agent/logs/ng-watch.log'
